message:
fix: update proptest_policy for Connector ActionKind variants

- Add 6 ConnectorAction variants to arb_action_kind() strategy so
  proptests exercise the full action space
- Fix prop_action_kind_destructive_consistency: ConnectorCredentialAction
  is destructive but not mutating (connector-level, like DeleteFile)

All 95 proptest_policy tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
